title: Tskilling
compiled_truth: Tskilling is an external contact at [Tribune](companies/tribune). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-08-15), Tskilling sent 5 and received 66 emails, totalling 71 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (4), [Jskilli](people/jskilli) (1).
